technique_summary: Solid intermediate performance with methodical approach. Good instrument coordination throughout deployment and positioning phases. Completion time of 102 seconds falls in intermediate range (40-90s expert, 90-180s intermediate).
improvement_suggestions: Reduce loop deployment time from 30s to under 20s for expert level
Streamline cinching process to achieve sub-90s total time
strengths: Smooth loop deployment with proper instrument handling
Accurate targeting and positioning of loop
